title: steiropteris pennellii
side_effects: Steiropteris pennellii can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, including skin irritation, itching, and respiratory problems. Ingesting the plant can also cause gastrointestinal issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Overuse of Steiropteris pennellii can lead to liver and kidney damage due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts may also cause headaches and dizziness in some individuals.
